Package index

All functions

df_ll
Example Measles Linelist Data
df_ll_ebola
Example Ebola Linelist Data
df_ll_measles
Example Measles Linelist Data for Chad
epi_dashboard()
Create a custom epishiny dashboard
epishiny_tr()
Translate text using the active epishiny language
epishiny_tr_names()
Translate the names of a named vector
epishiny_tr_ui()
Translate text for live UI updating with shiny.i18n
filter_ui() filter_server()
Filter module
geo_layer()
Build a geo layer to be used in the 'place' module
get_epishiny_i18n()
Get the epishiny Translator object
init_epishiny_i18n()
Initialise or reset the epishiny Translator
language_selector_server()
Language selector server
language_selector_ui()
Language selector UI
launch_demo_dashboard()
Launch epishiny demo dashboard
launch_module()
Launch a single 'epishiny' module as a standalone shiny app
person_ui() person_server()
Person module
place_ui() place_server()
Place module
prime_epishiny_i18n()
Prime the translator for span-wrapped UI strings
set_epishiny_language()
Set the active translation language
sf_sle
Sierra Leone Western Area Administrative Boundaries
sf_tcd
Chad Mandoul Region Administrative Boundaries
sf_yem
Yemen Governorate (adm1) and District (adm2) Administrative Boundaries
time_ui() time_server()
Time module
update_epishiny_select()
Update a selectInput after a language change
update_epishiny_virtual_select_label()
Update a virtualSelectInput label after a language change
use_epishiny_i18n()
Include shiny.i18n assets in the app UI

Developed by Paul Cambpell.

Site built with pkgdown 2.2.0.
